clusters.note: Cluster RAR universally reports a0_cluster ~ (5-10) x a0_SPARC. A single SQT prediction a0 = cH0/(2 pi) cannot match both SPARC and cluster scales simultaneously. Universality fails on cluster scale regardless of SPARC-internal per-galaxy spread.

verdict: FAIL — a0 not universal; environment dependence and/or cluster mismatch.
